_meta.description: Machine-readable index of every module in the NCE Events Frappe app. Read this file FIRST before exploring the codebase. See also AGENTS.md at the project root for contributor conventions.
_meta.usage: Find the module whose 'purpose' matches your task, then read only that file and its 'depends_on' entries. AGENTS.md lists reusable helpers — check there before adding new code.

architecture.overview: NCE Events is a Frappe app that renders configurable multi-panel data explorer pages. It has a Python API layer and two frontend generations: V1 (vanilla JS class-based) and V2 (Vue 3 SFC with Vite build). Both share SMS/Email dialogs from V1. Depends on nce_sync app. V2 supports optional frozen Form Dialogs for editing panel rows without leaving the panel page.
architecture.data_flow: Frappe Page (panel_page / panel_page_v2) → JS/Vue → frappe.call() → api/panel_api.py, api/messaging.py, api/tags.py, api/reports.py, api/form_dialog_api.py → Frappe ORM → MariaDB
key_patterns: V2 Vue app built separately: npm run build in public/js/panel_page_v2/ then bench build
V2 reuses V1 SmsDialog, EmailDialog, and ai_tools.js at runtime — do NOT duplicate
Python helpers follow snake_case private convention (_helper_name) — check AGENTS.md before adding
frozenset used for fieldtype/fieldname skip sets
Tag system uses Jinja template tags with gender-conditional pronouns
Form Dialog: frozen_meta_json (snapshot of frappe.get_meta fields) is parsed by parseLayout.js + rendered by PanelFormDialog.vue. Only DocTypes in WP Tables are eligible.
Form Dialog buttons: script text is copied from Desk at capture/rebuild time — not live-linked. Rebuild is manual.

nce_events/hooks.py.purpose: App config: metadata, required_apps (nce_sync), global JS/CSS includes, doctype_js overrides, apps screen entry

nce_events/api/panel_api.py.purpose: Core panel data API: fetch panel config, fetch paginated/filtered panel data, export CSV, save SQL filter, child doctype discovery, field metadata

nce_events/api/messaging.py.purpose: Email and SMS messaging: preview Jinja-rendered message, send bulk panel message, get email accounts

nce_events/api/tags.py.purpose: Jinja tag generation for email/SMS templates — pronoun tags, gender-conditional values

nce_events/api/reports.py.purpose: Report generation — panel data as structured report output

nce_events/api/credentials.py.purpose: Read credential_config JSON from API Connector doctype — returns auth_pattern, base_url, required credential values

nce_events/api/hierarchy_explorer.py.purpose: Hierarchy explorer backend — tree traversal for hierarchical doctypes

nce_events/api/llm.py.purpose: LLM/AI integration helpers for AI tools panel feature

nce_events/api/form_dialog_api.py.purpose: CRUD and schema-capture API for Form Dialog DocType. Validates DocType is in WP Tables. Capture freezes live Desk meta. save_form_dialog_document updates linked docs for fetch_from then saves (used when writeback_on_submit).
sections: Capture / rebuild frozen schema from frappe.get_meta
Get frozen definition for V2 renderer
Save with server-side fetch_from writeback to linked records

nce_events/utils/writeback.py.purpose: Optional writeback_fetched_fields for batch/server use. Panel dialog uses save_form_dialog_document instead.

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/page_panel.purpose: Core config doctype — one record per root DocType being displayed. Stores column order, filters, gender config, email/SMS fields, computed columns, and optional link to a Form Dialog for V2 row editing.
Child table for SQL-expression computed columns on a panel

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_defin.purpose: Card layout definition — composite display card with tabs, fields, actions, graphics

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/card_porta.purpose: Portal page definition — ordered columns of cards

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/display_se.purpose: Global display settings singleton for NCE Events UI

nce_events/nce_events/doctype/form_dialo.purpose: Frozen Desk form definition for V2 dialog rendering. One record per named dialog. Stores frozen_meta_json (fields array snapshot from frappe.get_meta), dialog_size, is_active, writeback_on_submit, and child buttons table. Only DocTypes in WP Tables are allowed as target_doctype.

Child table of Form Dialog. Each row is an action button shown in the V2 dialog. Stores a copied button_script (JS) and sort_order. Scripts are copied from Desk Client Scripts manually; rebuild updates them.

frontend_v0.note: Renamed from panel_page to panel_page_v0. Any reference to the old /js/panel_page/ path will 404 — use this to surface stale references. Pending deletion after V2 validation.

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v0/ui.js.purpose: V0 Explorer class — renders panel table, handles pagination, column toggle, row click (defunct — pending deletion)

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v0/store.purpose: V0 Store class — state management for V0 panel (defunct — pending deletion)

nce_events/public/js/schema_explorer.js.purpose: Tag Finder V1 — DocType field browser for building Jinja template tags

nce_events/public/js/email_template_tags.purpose: DocType JS extension for Email Template — adds Tag Finder button

nce_events/public/js/api_connector_tags..purpose: DocType JS extension for API Connector — tag generation helpers

nce_events/public/js/enrollments_exchang.purpose: Enrollments data exchange UI — globally included

frontend_v2.note: V2 is a Vue 3 SFC app built with Vite. Source in public/js/panel_page_v2/, built output in public/js/panel_page_v2_dist/. Run update_v2.sh to build.

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/share.purpose: SMS compose/send dialog — loaded at runtime by V2 via frappe.require()
Email compose/send dialog — loaded at runtime by V2 via frappe.require()
AI tools sidebar panel — loaded at runtime by V2 via frappe.require()

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/App.v.purpose: V2 root component — panel orchestration, tab management, panel switching, form dialog open/close from row action

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/compo.purpose: V2 composable — load panel config and data, refetch with user_filters
V2 composable — Tag Finder field loading and tag generation
V2 composable — card form state and submission

V2 composable — load Form Dialog definition, manage reactive doc state, validate mandatory fields, save/insert (uses save_form_dialog_document when writeback_on_submit), fetch_from via handleFetchFrom. Used by PanelFormDialog.vue.
Main data table component for V2 panel — columns, rows, pagination, sorting
Tab navigation bar for switching between panels
Tag Finder V2 — Vue port of schema_explorer.js for template tag building
Modal dialog wrapping TagFinder for in-context tag insertion
Table column cell renderer with tag highlighting
Side panel showing available actions (email, SMS, AI tools) for selected rows
Card definition form renderer within modal
Read-only display widget for card fields
Editable field widget for card form inputs
Floating overlay panel for contextual actions
Grid layout container for card widgets

V2 form dialog rendered from frozen Form Dialog definition. Shows Frappe-layout tabs/sections/columns. Save goes through composable (server writeback when writeback_on_submit). Opened from a panel row when panel.form_dialog is set.

Single field renderer inside PanelFormDialog. Maps Frappe fieldtype → control element (FormControl, checkbox, select, Link placeholder, etc.). Respects hidden/read_only/reqd and depends_on eval expressions.

nce_events/public/js/panel_page_v2/utils.purpose: Utility: Promise wrapper for frappe.call (shared by usePanel, usePanelFormDialog, useCardForm).
Utility: Frappe-style depends_on / *_depends_on evaluation and layout fieldtype list for frozen form meta.
Utility: parse a flat Frappe DocField array into a nested Tabs→Sections→Columns→Fields tree. Used by usePanelFormDialog to render frozen_meta_json layout.
Utility: maps every Frappe fieldtype string to a { component, props } config (or { layout } for structural types). Single source of truth for fieldtype→control mapping in V2 dialogs.

nce_events/public/js/hierarchy_explorer/.purpose: Hierarchy Explorer UI — tree view rendering for hierarchical doctypes
Hierarchy Explorer state — tree data, expansion state
Hierarchy Explorer configuration — which doctypes to show as hierarchies
